testsuite.name: HeadlessChrome 148.0.0 (Windows 10.0.0)

property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: Formatter Utilities Empty string should be treated as falsy
Formatter Utilities Non-empty string should be truthy
Formatter Utilities Numeric zero should be falsy
View1 Controller I should test the View1 controller
View1 Controller Controller should have an onInit function
View1 Controller Controller metadata should have correct type
View1 Controller Controller should extend sap.ui.core.mvc.Controller
View1 Controller Controller display name should match expected value (intentional fail)
testcase.failure: This test intentionally fails to demonstrate failure reporting Expected: "ns.html5module.controller.WrongName" Actual: "ns.html5module.controller.View1" at Assert.strictEqual (node_modules/qunit/qunit/qunit.js:1885:14)

testcase.name: View1 Controller Controller should be destroyable
Model Utilities createDeviceModel should return a JSONModel
Model Utilities Device model should have isMobile property
Model Utilities Device model version should match (intentional fail)
testcase.failure: This test intentionally fails Expected: "2.0" Actual: "1.0" at Assert.strictEqual (node_modules/qunit/qunit/qunit.js:1885:14)

testcase.name: Navigation Journey Should see the initial page of the app
testcase.failure: Died on test #1: Given.iStartMyApp is not a function at r (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/resources/sap/ui/test/opaQunit.js:6:1821) at o (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/resources/sap/ui/test/opaQunit.js:6:902) at webapp/test/integration/NavigationJourney.js:13:5 at c (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/resources/sap-ui-core.js:10:17118) TypeError: Given.iStartMyApp is not a function at Object.<anonymous> (webapp/test/integration/NavigationJourney.js:14:15) at Object.<anonymous> (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/resources/sap/ui/test/opaQunit.js:6:1998)

testsuite.system-out: HeadlessChrome 148.0.0 (Windows 10.0.0) INFO: '2026-05-25 17:42:12 [context.html] Device API logging initialized - DEVICE'
